Version
  • API Reference
  • Content
  • Content

Content

The content system provides a polymorphic representation of message payloads. Every Message carries a vector of Content items, each tagged with a ContentType discriminator. Factory functions such as text_content and function_call_content make it easy to construct content items without manipulating the struct directly.

Core Types

AgentFramework.AbstractContent — Type

Base type for all content variants.

AgentFramework.Content — Type
Content

Unified content container covering all content variants.

Use the constructor functions (text_content, data_content, function_call_content, etc.) rather than constructing directly.

Core fields

  • type::ContentType: The content variant.
  • text::Union{Nothing, String}: Text payload (for TEXT, TEXT_REASONING).
  • uri::Union{Nothing, String}: URI reference (for URI).
  • media_type::Union{Nothing, String}: MIME type (for DATA, URI).
  • call_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Tool call ID (for FUNCTIONCALL, FUNCTIONRESULT).
  • name::Union{Nothing, String}: Function/tool name (for FUNCTION_CALL).
  • arguments::Union{Nothing, String}: JSON-encoded arguments (for FUNCTION_CALL).
  • result::Any: Tool result value (for FUNCTION_RESULT).
  • annotations::Union{Nothing, Vector{Annotation}}: Content annotations.
  • additional_properties::Dict{String, Any}: Extension properties.
AgentFramework.ContentType — Type
ContentType

Enum of all content variant types, matching the Python ContentType literal.

Content Type Constants

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.TEXT. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.DATA. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.HOSTED_FILE. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.FUNCTION_CALL. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.FUNCTION_RESULT. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.USAGE. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.HOSTED_VECTOR_STORE. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Factory Functions

AgentFramework.text_content — Function
text_content(text; annotations=nothing, additional_properties=nothing) -> Content

Create a text content item.

AgentFramework.reasoning_content — Function
reasoning_content(text; annotations=nothing, additional_properties=nothing) -> Content

Create a reasoning/thinking content item (chain-of-thought from reasoning models).

AgentFramework.data_content — Function
data_content(data, media_type; annotations=nothing) -> Content

Create a data content item with base64-encoded binary data.

AgentFramework.uri_content — Function
uri_content(uri; media_type=nothing, annotations=nothing) -> Content

Create a URI-referencing content item.

AgentFramework.error_content — Function
error_content(message; error_code=nothing, error_details=nothing) -> Content

Create an error content item.

AgentFramework.function_call_content — Function
function_call_content(call_id, name, arguments; annotations=nothing) -> Content

Create a function/tool call content item (emitted by the LLM).

AgentFramework.function_result_content — Function
function_result_content(call_id, result; name=nothing, exception=nothing) -> Content

Create a function/tool result content item.

AgentFramework.function_approval_request_content — Function
function_approval_request_content(id, function_call; annotations=nothing) -> Content

Create a function approval request, asking the user to approve a tool call.

AgentFramework.function_approval_response_content — Function
function_approval_response_content(approved, id, function_call; annotations=nothing) -> Content

Create a function approval response indicating whether a tool call was approved.

AgentFramework.usage_content — Function
usage_content(details) -> Content

Create a usage details content item.

AgentFramework.hosted_file_content — Function
hosted_file_content(file_id) -> Content

Create a hosted file reference content item.

AgentFramework.hosted_vector_store_content — Function
hosted_vector_store_content(vector_store_id) -> Content

Create a hosted vector store reference content item.

Approval Helpers

AgentFramework.to_approval_response — Function
to_approval_response(content, approved) -> Content

Convert a functionapprovalrequest content to a functionapprovalresponse.

AgentFramework.is_approval_request — Function

Check if content is a function approval request.

AgentFramework.is_approval_response — Function

Check if content is a function approval response.

Query Functions

AgentFramework.is_text — Function
is_text(content::Content) -> Bool

Check if content is a text variant.

AgentFramework.is_reasoning — Function
is_reasoning(content::Content) -> Bool

Check if content is a reasoning/thinking variant.

AgentFramework.is_function_call — Function
is_function_call(content::Content) -> Bool

Check if content is a function call.

AgentFramework.is_function_result — Function
is_function_result(content::Content) -> Bool

Check if content is a function result.

AgentFramework.get_text — Function
get_text(content::Content) -> String

Extract text from a content item. Returns empty string if not a text type.

get_text(msg::Message) -> String

Concatenate text from all text content items in the message.

get_text(update::ChatResponseUpdate) -> String

Extract text from a streaming update.

get_text(response::ChatResponse) -> String

Extract concatenated text from all response messages.

get_text(response::AgentResponse) -> String
AgentFramework.parse_arguments — Function
parse_arguments(content::Content) -> Union{Nothing, Dict{String, Any}}

Parse the JSON arguments of a function call content item.

Serialization

AgentFramework.content_to_dict — Function
content_to_dict(content::Content; exclude_none=true) -> Dict{String, Any}

Serialize a Content to a Dict, omitting nothing fields by default.

AgentFramework.content_from_dict — Function
content_from_dict(d::Dict{String, Any}) -> Content

Deserialize a Content from a Dict.

Usage and Annotations

AgentFramework.UsageDetails — Type
UsageDetails

Token usage information from an LLM response.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.add_usage_details. Check Documenter's build log for details.

AgentFramework.Annotation — Type
Annotation

Metadata annotation on a content item (citations, file paths, etc.).

Media Type Utilities

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.content_type_string. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.parse_content_type. Check Documenter's build log for details.

AgentFramework.detect_media_type_from_base64 — Function
detect_media_type_from_base64(data::String) -> Union{String, Nothing}

Detect the media type of base64-encoded binary data by examining magic byte prefixes. Returns a MIME type string or nothing if unrecognised.

Examples

detect_media_type_from_base64("iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSU...")  # "image/png"
detect_media_type_from_base64("JVBERi0xLjQ...")          # "application/pdf"
detect_media_type_from_base64("dW5rbm93bg==")            # nothing
